title: Filter "My Work" by Workspace
excerpt: I would love it if I was able to filter the “my work” page by workspace. This would allow me to hide work when I’m doing personal tasks, hide personal tasks when I’m working, as well as filter by what type of work (ie: m…

posts.author: sandy459333 (Sandy Esraeil)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love it if I was able to filter the “my work” page by workspace. This would allow me to hide work when I’m doing personal tasks, hide personal tasks when I’m working, as well as filter by what type of work (ie: marketing work) I am seeing come up.

posts.author: Sam_H (SammH)
posts.cookedHtml:
I was just coming here to say that if they could add the filtering and saved views like exist on regular boards onto the My Work page, this would be very helpful.

The different views are a great start, but I need to be able to filter by priority, due date, group so I can narrow the amount of things I’m having to concentrate on to see my daily tasks.

Also, adding subitems from the My Work page so it’s fully comprehensive and can allow you to work fully from there vs. having to hop around between boards.

posts.author: sandy459333 (Sandy Esraeil)
posts.cookedHtml: I quite agree. I’m thinking, it would be much easier to batch tasks this way.

posts.author: i.moreno (Ignacio Moreno Ortega [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!,
I am Nacho and I am part of the Decadis team, I would like to recommend you our application, Batch Hero for monday

In particular, the operations of Filtering options help to conduct the batch operations more efficiently. Easily narrow down the number of boards in the table by using two different types of sophisticated filters.

I invite you to give this functionality a try in case it fits your requirements.

If you need assistance on how to use the application, please, feel free to create a request in our support portal , we will be happy to help you.

Best regards,
Nacho
